meta.title: Techniques for routine culture of fastidious anaerobes

abstractHtml: Laboratory equipment and techniques which have been developed for the production of highly reduced media and for the handling and inoculation of large numbers of fastidiously anaerobic bacteria are described. With these techniques over 150 cultural and biochemical characteristics have been routinely determined on several hundred strains of anaerobes with a minimum of effort.
affiliationsHtml: • Department of Veterinary Science, Virginia Agricultural Experiment Station, Blacksburg, Virginia
